security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: https:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://127.0.0.1:8220 http://127.0.0.1:8220; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: A GUI tool for managing your hosts file
bundle.longDescription: SwitchHosts is an open-source app for managing and switching between multiple hosts configurations.
